features.featureTitle: Rebuild the Leaflet map integration in WorldMapPage.tsx and ATMapPage.tsx from scratch: remove any CDN-based Leaflet script/CSS loading from index.html and instead install Leaflet as an npm package (leaflet + @types/leaflet), import Leaflet CSS directly in the component files, fix the default marker icon broken asset paths by explicitly setting L.Icon.Default.mergeOptions with the correct icon URLs pointing to the leaflet/dist/images assets, and ensure the map container div has an explicit pixel height so the map renders correctly.

Audit and clean up frontend/index.html to remove any Leaflet CDN script or link tags (CSS and JS) that conflict with the npm-installed Leaflet package. Ensure only one source of Leaflet is loaded in the application.
